title: [perf][no-gaps] fj-interpreters DCE all-used shallow-retention path after EquationList

profile_backed_target.source: Post-frankenjax-lsjey RCH ts1 fj-interpreters pe_baseline profile

lever.description: Route every non-empty DCE graph through the retained-count path so all-retained graphs can shallow-clone EquationList storage. Empty Jaxprs retain the old zero-iteration Vec path.

baseline.command: RCH_FORCE_REMOTE=1 RCH_WORKER=ts1 RCH_WORKERS=ts1 RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/rch-frankenjax-kqtzy-focused-baseline cargo bench -p fj-interpreters --bench pe_baseline -- 'dce/all_used/(10eq|100eq|1000eq)' --sample-size 10 --measurement-time 3 --warm-up-time 1 --noplot

after.command: RCH_FORCE_REMOTE=1 RCH_WORKER=ts1 RCH_WORKERS=ts1 RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/rch-frankenjax-kqtzy-final2 cargo bench -p fj-interpreters --bench pe_baseline -- 'dce/all_used/(10eq|100eq|1000eq)' --sample-size 10 --measurement-time 3 --warm-up-time 1 --noplot

dce/all_used/1000eq.note: Not scored. The baseline and candidate both use the retained-count branch for 1000eq; the slower row is treated as worker/run noise, not a claimed win.

isomorphism_proof.ordering: Preserved. The selective-retention path emits equations by forward iterating the original EquationList with retain_eqn flags, matching original equation order. The all-retained fast path returns the same ordered EquationList storage.
isomorphism_proof.tie_breaking: No tie-breaking exists in DCE liveness; the same output mask and reverse liveness walk determine retained equations.
isomorphism_proof.floating_point: No floating-point arithmetic is introduced or removed; the pass only prunes or retains IR equations.
isomorphism_proof.rng: No RNG state or randomness is read or written.
isomorphism_proof.empty_graphs: The empty Jaxpr case remains on the old reverse-then-reverse Vec path and performs zero iterations.
isomorphism_proof.used_inputs_and_outputs: The needed bitset seeding, input mask construction, and retained outvar zip/filter logic are unchanged.

verification.command: RCH_FORCE_REMOTE=1 RCH_WORKER=ts1 RCH_WORKERS=ts1 RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/rch-frankenjax-kqtzy-check cargo check -p fj-interpreters --lib
verification.note: Existing fj-lax dead_code warning for jacobi_eigendecomposition observed outside this bead.

verification.command: RCH_FORCE_REMOTE=1 RCH_WORKER=ts1 RCH_WORKERS=ts1 RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/rch-frankenjax-kqtzy-test cargo test -p fj-interpreters --lib partial_eval -- --nocapture

RCH_FORCE_REMOTE=1 RCH_WORKER=ts1 RCH_WORKERS=ts1 RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/rch-frankenjax-kqtzy-conformance cargo test -p fj-conformance --test pe_staging_oracle -- --nocapture

RCH_FORCE_REMOTE=1 RCH_WORKER=ts1 RCH_WORKERS=ts1 RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/rch-frankenjax-kqtzy-clippy cargo clippy -p fj-interpreters --all-targets --no-deps -- -D warnings
verification.note: Dependency linting excluded to avoid the unrelated fj-lax warning masking this crate.

UBS fmt, clippy, cargo check, tests-build, cargo-audit, and cargo-deny sections passed. Existing inventories include test unwraps/asserts/indexing and a known Instant::now false positive; no unsafe block was found.
